Envision the Future,
Transform the Present

IIM Kashipur is a second-generation IIM set up by the Government of India in 2011. It aspires to achieve excellence in management education through innovative teaching, high-quality research, and sustainable leadership.

Latest Updates

News & Insights

Research
April 28, 2026
IIM Kashipur Faculty Publishes Landmark Study on Rural Entrepreneurship
A new research paper from the Economics faculty explores how micro-financing is reshaping rural business ecosystems across Uttarakhand.
Read More →
Placement
May 2, 2026
Batch 2024–26 Records 100% Placement with Avg. CTC of ₹14.8 LPA
The outgoing MBA batch achieved its highest-ever average package, with top recruiters from FMCG, consulting, and fintech sectors.
Read More →
Campus Life
May 7, 2026
Kaushalya 2026 — Annual Management Fest Draws 3000+ Participants
The flagship management festival saw participation from 80+ institutes across India, with events spanning finance, marketing, and operations.
Read More →

May
EOI Submission Deadline — PGP 2026–28 Admitted Candidates
All shortlisted candidates must submit their Expression of Interest by 11:59 PM IST. Login to the admissions portal.

18
May
International Conference on Sustainable Business Practices
IIM Kashipur invites research papers for the 4th ICSBP. Submission portal opens May 18, 2026.

May
PGP Final Semester Results Declared
Results for Semester IV (2024–26 Batch) are available on the student portal. Queries may be addressed to academics@iimkashipur.ac.in.

May
